filters._comment: What counts as relevant. categories: applies ONLY to direct company ATS pulls (community repos are already curated tech-internship lists, so ALL their roles are kept). include_intl: keep non-US roles (flagged, not dropped). require_intern_keyword_for_ats: only keep ATS roles whose title looks like an internship. min_posted_date: drop postings posted before this YYYY-MM-DD (applies to every source). drop_unknown_posted_date: also drop rows with no date (README rows have none) -- default false. seen_retention_days: 0 = keep the full archive forever; >0 prunes long-delisted entries.

sources.name: PyTorch
sources.note: Open-source project (Meta/Linux Foundation); no dedicated corporate ATS.

sources.name: Bloomberg
sources.note: Custom bloomberg.com/company/careers portal (only Bloomberg Philanthropies is on Greenhouse).

sources.name: Rippling
sources.note: Runs its own ats.rippling.com (not Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby); still surfaces via the community repos.
